name: Pecan Catfish & Sweet Potato Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the catfish into 1/2 x 2-inch pieces.
2. Brush each piece with a mixture of brown mustard and honey.
3. Dredge in a mixture of ground pecans and seasoned bread crumbs, setting aside.
4. Heat peanut oil in a pan over medium heat.
5. Saute the sweet potato slices until crisp and brown, then drain on paper towels.
6. Add more oil to the pan if needed.
7. Cook the catfish pieces for 4-5 minutes per side, or until they flake easily with a fork.
8. Serve the fish alongside the seasoned sweet potato chips and orange wedges.
